name: Grilled Salmon with Honey Mustard Glaze
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces salmon fillets, brushed with oil
recipeInstructions:
STEP ONE: Prepare the Honey-Mustard Glaze
In a bowl, combine honey, mustard, water, and soy sauce. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
STEP TWO: Prepare the Salmon Fillet
Brush one six-ounce salmon fillet lightly with oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill each side for 2-3 minutes. Turn the fish over carefully only once to mark the surface; cook to desired texture. Brush the flesh side of fish with glaze before removing from grill. Serve immediately.
